channel.title: Azure Files on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Files on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: File share centric management model (Microsoft.FileShares) for Azure Files
item.description:
Azure Files is in public preview for a file share–centric management model (Microsoft.FileShares) that makes file shares top-level resources to simplify creating and managing file shares in Azure.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Files provisioned v2 billing model for SSD (premium)
item.description:
Azure Files has introduced the provisioned v2 billing model for its SSD (premium) tier, allowing separate provisioning of storage, IOPS, and throughput.

  • Source: Azure Updates
